indexes.expression: create unique index "incident_escalation_policies_org_tenant_key_unique" on "incident_escalation_policies" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "key") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_impacts_target_unique" on "incident_impacts" ("incident_id", "target_type", (coalesce("target_id"::text, "component_label"))) where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_links_incident_linked_kind_unique" on "incident_links" ("incident_id", "linked_incident_id", "kind") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_participants_incident_user_kind_unique" on "incident_participants" ("incident_id", "user_id", "kind") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_postmortems_incident_unique" on "incident_postmortems" ("incident_id") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_roles_org_tenant_key_unique" on "incident_roles" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "key") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_runbook_steps_runbook_position_unique" on "incident_runbook_steps" ("runbook_id", "position") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_runbooks_org_tenant_key_unique" on "incident_runbooks" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "key") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_service_components_org_tenant_key_unique" on "incident_service_components" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "key") where "deleted_at" is null

create index "incident_service_components_source_idx" on "incident_service_components" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "source_type", "source_id") where "deleted_at" is null and "source_type" is not null and "source_id" is not null

create unique index "incident_service_dependencies_unique" on "incident_service_dependencies" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "source_component_id", "target_component_id", "dependency_kind") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_settings_org_tenant_unique" on "incident_settings" ("organization_id", "tenant_id") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_severities_org_tenant_key_unique" on "incident_severities" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "key") where "deleted_at" is null
create index "incident_triggers_org_tenant_event_enabled_idx" on "incident_triggers" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "event_id", "is_enabled") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_triggers_org_tenant_event_unique" on "incident_triggers" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "event_id") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incident_types_org_tenant_key_unique" on "incident_types" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "key") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incidents_org_tenant_number_unique" on "incidents" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "number") where "deleted_at" is null
create unique index "incidents_org_tenant_source_event_ref_unique" on "incidents" ("organization_id", "tenant_id", "source_event_ref") where "deleted_at" is null and "source_event_ref" is not null
